<!-- Generated by /laravel-init -->
# watch-anime — Laravel Development Guide

> Stack: **Inertia + React (TypeScript)** | PHP 8.4+ | Laravel 12 | Pest

## Workflow

Follow these steps in order. Never skip or auto-advance.

```
1. /laravel-init      <- bootstrap (already done)
2. /brainstorm        <- clarify design, no coding yet
3. /write-plan        <- decision-complete plan -> tasks/todo.md
4. /execute-plan      <- implement in batches, log to tasks/progress.md
5. /laravel-lint      <- pint + phpstan + rector (must be clean before continuing)
6. /laravel-test      <- pest coverage (must pass)
7. /security-check    <- OWASP + Laravel security audit
8. /review            <- self-review, report only
9. /smart-commit      <- conventional commit
10. /finish-feature   <- changelog + PR
```

## Project Memory

Read these files at the start of every task:
- `tasks/findings.md` — key decisions and project constraints
- `tasks/lessons.md` — past mistakes and how to avoid them
- `tasks/todo.md` — current plan

Write to these files continuously:
- `tasks/progress.md` — every attempt, error, and resolution
- `tasks/findings.md` — anything important discovered mid-task

**Never overwrite** `tasks/lessons.md` or `tasks/security-findings.md`.

## Lessons Capture

When the user corrects you:
- Explicit: `lesson:`, `remember:`, `don't do this again:` -> append to `tasks/lessons.md` immediately
- Implicit: detect "no", "don't", "instead", "wrong" -> ask "Should I add this to lessons.md?" -> append on confirmation

Entry format:
```
### [YYYY-MM-DD] [Brief title]
**Mistake:** What went wrong
**Root cause:** Why it happened
**Prevention:** What to do differently
```

## Architecture

### Actions (Required)
All business logic lives in `app/Actions/`. One class per operation.

```
app/Actions/
├── Auth/
├── Anime/
├── Watchlist/
└── History/
```

- Single `handle()` method, injected constructor dependencies
- `final` classes
- Controllers call actions — never put logic in controllers

### Directory Structure
```
app/
├── Actions/          <- business logic (required)
├── Console/Commands/ <- artisan commands (auto-registered)
├── DTOs/             <- data transfer objects (optional)
├── Exceptions/       <- custom exceptions
├── Http/
│   ├── Controllers/  <- thin, call actions only
│   ├── Middleware/   <- registered in bootstrap/app.php (Laravel 12)
│   └── Requests/     <- Form Requests (validation always here)
├── Models/           <- Eloquent models
├── Policies/         <- authorization policies
├── Services/         <- external service wrappers (e.g. ConsumetService)
└── Providers/        <- service providers
```

## PHP Rules

- PHP 8.4+ — constructor property promotion everywhere
- Explicit return types on ALL methods (including `void`)
- `final` on all classes not meant to be extended
- `readonly` on properties that don't change after construction
- PHPDoc only when type system can't express it
- Curly braces on ALL control structures
- `match` over `switch`
- No `env()` outside `config/` files — use `config('key')` everywhere else
- `declare(strict_types=1)` at top of every PHP file

## Eloquent Rules

- Auto eager loading is enabled — lazy loading throws in non-production
- Always eager load with `with()` or `load()` for relationships you'll use
- Use `casts()` method (not `$casts` property) — Laravel 12
- All date casts use `immutable_datetime`
- Explicit `$fillable` — never `$guarded = []`
- Scopes for all reusable query logic
- Policies for all authorization — never inline `$user->id === $model->user_id`

## Validation

- Form Request for every controller method that accepts input
- Never `$request->validate()` in controllers or actions
- Authorize in Form Request's `authorize()` method or use policies

## Testing (Pest)

- Freeze time in every test: `Carbon::setTestNow(now())`
- `Http::fake()` in tests that don't need real HTTP calls
- `Sleep::fake()` where applicable
- Datasets for repetitive validation cases
- Feature tests for all HTTP endpoints
- Unit tests for all Actions
- Run focused tests: `./vendor/bin/pest --filter=TestName`

## Inertia + React (TypeScript)

- TypeScript strict mode — no `any` types
- Use `useForm` helper for all forms
- Inertia v2 features: deferred props, prefetching, polling
- Shared components in `resources/js/components/`
- Pages in `resources/js/pages/`
- Layouts in `resources/js/layouts/`

## Code Quality Gates

Run before every commit — all must pass:
```bash
vendor/bin/pint --dirty          # format
vendor/bin/phpstan analyse       # level 9
vendor/bin/rector --dry-run      # check for improvements
```

Or use: `/laravel-lint`

## Security

- Use policies for all authorization
- Validate all input at Form Request layer
- `$hidden` on models for sensitive attributes
- Signed URLs for temporary access
- Rate limiting on all public endpoints
- Never trust user-supplied IDs without authorization check

## 3-Strike Protocol

When blocked:
1. Log attempt + error to `tasks/progress.md`
2. Try a different approach
3. On 3rd failure — stop and ask the user what was tried

Never retry the same failing approach.
